rationale.fidelity: Correctly retains one threshold, latent class, observed noisy score, asymmetric immediate losses, and expected-loss minimization; some full mapping details remain implicit.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly states the platform choice, stakes, classification mechanism, and error trade-off, while trigger and explicit counterfactual are implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly claim is requested or made.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly rejects long-run community-health and trust effects absent modeled outcomes and causal evidence.
rationale.overall: A concise, decision-focused narrative that respects both classification uncertainty and causal boundaries; no hard failure applies.
